paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **WizardMath**, a framework combining **Math Evol-Instruct** (downward/upward evolution of math problems) with **Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)**—a novel pipeline integrating **Instruction Reward Models (IRM)** and **Process-Supervised Reward Models (PRM)** to improve multi-step mathematical reasoning without Python tool integration. This surpasses existing open-source models by leveraging automated instruction evolution and process supervision
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: GSM8k, MATH training sets + evolved math instructions
raw_extraction.application: Multi-step mathematical problem solving, chain-of-thought reasoning, educational applications
raw_extraction.license: Open-source (details unspecified but implied to follow Microsoft’s open-source policies)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities in large language models across grade-school to high-school levels
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling + Math Evol-Instruct (downward/upward evolution)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with evolved math instructions + Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **WizardMath**, a framework combining **Math Evol-Instruct** (downward/upward evolution of math problems) with **Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)**—a novel pipeline integrating **Instruction Reward Models (IRM)** and **Process-Supervised Reward Models (PRM)** to improve multi-step mathematical reasoning without Python tool integration. The 70B variant outperforms proprietary models like GPT-3.5-Turbo and GPT-4 early versions
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: GSM8k, MATH training sets + evolved math instructions
raw_extraction.application: Multi-step mathematical problem solving, chain-of-thought reasoning, advanced educational applications
raw_extraction.license: Open-source (details unspecified but implied to follow Microsoft’s open-source policies)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities in large language models across grade-school to high-school levels
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling + Math Evol-Instruct (downward/upward evolution)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with evolved math instructions + Reinforcement Learning from Evol-Instruct Feedback (RLEIF)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **WizardMath**, a mathematical reasoning model enhanced through **Evol-Instruct** (multi-round instruction refinement) and **Process Reward Modeling (PRM)** combined with **Instructional Reward Modeling (IRM)**. Achieves state-of-the-art performance on GSM8K and MATH benchmarks by leveraging structured mathematical problem-solving steps and iterative instruction evolution
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, grade/high-school-level problem solving, educational applications
raw_extraction.license: Open-source (via Meta's standard release terms, inferred from context)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) + Evol-Instruct + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instructional Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Fine-tuned Mistral-v0.1 7B model using **Evol-Instruct** and **PRM/IRM** techniques. Outperforms previous Mistral-based models like MetaMath-Mistral 7B by 12.8% on GSM8K and 27.2% on MATH, demonstrating robust generalization across varied problem complexities
raw_extraction.application: Mathematical reasoning, educational tutoring, specialized problem-solving
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) + Evol-Instruct + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instructional Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Utilizes Qwen2.5-Math base model with **7B parameters**, refined through **Evol-Instruct** and **PRM/IRM**. Achieves near-state-of-the-art performance (93.9% on GSM8K, 77.8% on MATH), showcasing strong adaptability to mathematical reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.application: High-precision mathematical problem-solving, advanced educational applications
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) + Evol-Instruct + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instructional Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Directly fine-tuned Qwen2.5 7B model using **Evol-Instruct** and **PRM/IRM** techniques. Demonstrates exceptional performance (94.0% on GSM8K, 74.5% on MATH) with minimal data augmentation, emphasizing the effectiveness of multi-stage instruction refinement
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) + Evol-Instruct + Process Reward Modeling (PRM) + Instructional Reward Modeling (IRM)
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **RLEIF**—a novel framework combining **instruction evolution**, **Instruction Quality Scoring Reward Model (IRM)**, and **Process-Supervised Reward Model (PRM)** with PPO-based RLHF to enhance mathematical reasoning. Uses synthetic data generation via evolving original instructions to improve performance with fewer training samples (~418K points vs competitors’ 580K–2.5M)
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Synthetic data based on GSM8k and MATH datasets through instruction evolution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing mathematical reasoning capabilities in LLMs through efficient instruction tuning
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Applies **RLEIF’s RLHF pipeline** (IRM for instruction quality scoring, PRM for process evaluation) to refine GPT-2-Small’s math reasoning via reward-guided policy optimization
raw_extraction.research_problem: Fine-tuning LLMs for improved mathematical reasoning via RLHF
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) via PPO + IRM/PRM
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Uses larger GPT-2 variant (0.3B) with refined synthetic data to boost math performance via instruction evolution
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Synthetic data from evolved GSM8k/MATH instructions
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling instruction-evolution techniques across smaller LLMs
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: Applies RLEIF’s RLHF pipeline to GPT-2-Medium, leveraging instruction-quality and process-reward signals for stronger math reasoning
raw_extraction.research_problem: RLHF-enhanced math reasoning in medium-sized LLMs
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: GPT-2-Large variant fine-tuned with evolved instructions to improve math accuracy via minimal synthetic data (~418K points)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient math reasoning enhancement via instruction evolution
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct

raw_extraction.innovation: RLHF refinement of GPT-2-Large using RLEIF’s reward-models to optimize mathematical reasoning chains
raw_extraction.application: Advanced math problem-solving, automated tutoring systems
raw_extraction.research_problem: RLHF-driven math reasoning improvements in mid-sized LLMs
raw_extraction.paper_title: WizardMath: Empowering Mathematical Reasoning for Large Language Models via Reinforced Evol-Instruct
